description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by three dark metal hoops. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the surface a rustic, weathered appearance, while the metal bands provide structural reinforcement and contrast visually with the wood. The top and bottom are flat and closed, with the top surface showing the circular end grain of the staves. The interior appears hollow, as seen from the open top, suggesting it is designed to hold or store materials. There are no visible handles, spigots, or markings on the exterior. The overall look is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storage or decorative use in urban or semi-industrial settings.
description: A robust, weathered wooden barrel with dark metal hoops and a hollow interior, featuring a rustic, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: The open top and interior of the barrel are visible, highlighting the circular wood grain and the thickness of the staves.
description_view_1: The closed top surface is visible, showing the flat, circular end grain of the wood and the three metal hoops around the body.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the open top and interior are visible, with the wood grain and metal hoops clearly defined.
description_view_3: The closed top is visible again, with the wood grain and metal hoops prominent, similar to view 1.
